name: label

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## label
**Type:** registry:ui
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** radix-ui

visual_summary: A label is a text-based UI component that provides a short description or prompt to users. It can be used to add context to other interactive elements, such as input fields or buttons. Typically, a label is displayed in a plain text format with an optional decorative icon.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready label component with the following characteristics:

Name: label
Description: A label is a text-based UI component that provides a short description or prompt to users. It can be used to add context to other interactive elements, such as input fields or buttons. Typically, a label is displayed in a plain text format with an optional decorative icon.
Style: standard, simple, inline
Interactions: 
Tags: text-based, description, prompt

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
